name: vun-skill-pack
description: Ship MVPs fast without shipping a breach. A pre-launch security gate (/preflight), secrets scanner, attack-surface mapping, data-flow tracing, vuln scanning, guided fixes, and launch triage — plus a senior appsec agent and auto-loading footgun guides for Next.js/Vercel, Supabase, Stripe, and Node/Express. Defensive review only.
